headline: 1 Chip Stock Making Bold Plans
summary: After seeing enough demand, ARM Holdings said they, too, are getting into the semiconductor manufacturing business.

headline: NANC Traders Beat the Crowd by 33 Points and the Difference Keeps Growing
summary: Two unconventional ETFs promise to monetize information edges that traditional fund managers ignore. The Unusual Whales Subversive Democratic Trading ETF (NASDAQ:NANC) mirrors stocks disclosed by Democratic members of Congress under the STOCK Act, while the VanEck Social Sentiment ETF (NYSEARCA:BUZZ) uses natural language processing to score social media chatter around large-cap US stocks. Both test ... NANC Traders Beat the Crowd by 33 Points and the Difference Keeps Growing

headline: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff Goes All-In on 'Awesome' Anthropic With $300 Million Spend, Hails Coding Agents: 'I've Never Been...'
summary: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said he plans to invest about $300 million in Anthropic's AI this year for coding, calling the company a fast-rising "rocket ship that will not stop."

headline: Salesforce Pushes Agentic AI Into Core Workflows With New Deployments
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is rolling out new agentic AI deployments across core enterprise workflows. The company has launched Agentforce Contact Center with Ribbon Communications and AI-driven communications integrations at scale. Salesforce has partnered with Moderna to support global operations through Agentforce Life Sciences. The company has also introduced new e-signature integrations with Syncfusion to extend workflow coverage. These moves put Salesforce's AI platform directly into front...
